parameters.query:
WITH price_rows AS (
  SELECT c.id AS comp_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_components_norm c
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_uuid = c.uex_uuid AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(c.uex_uuid, '') IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.id AS comp_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_components_norm c
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_external_id = c.uex_id AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(c.uex_uuid, '') IS NULL AND c.uex_id IS NOT NULL
),
sold_at_uex AS (
  SELECT
    pr.comp_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  tt.source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'location_name',       COALESCE(
          tt.metadata->>'space_station_name',
          tt.metadata->>'outpost_name',
          tt.metadata->>'city_name'
        ),
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_price',           pr.buy_price,
        'sell_price',          pr.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at
  FROM price_rows pr
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON concat('terminals:', pr.uex_terminal_id::text) = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY pr.comp_id
),
sold_at_dp4k AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS comp_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  si.terminal_source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'shop',                si.shop,
        'location',            si.location,
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_auec',            si.buy_auec,
        'sell_auec',           si.sell_auec
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at_dp4k
  FROM datap4k_components_norm c
  JOIN datap4k_shop_inventory si
    ON si.item_raw_id = c.raw_id AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_components_raw'
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON si.terminal_source_id = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY c.id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at, hidden
)
SELECT
  c.slug,
  'component',
  c.name,
  c.manufacturer,
  c.uex_category_name,
  c.uex_id,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                  c.name,
    'class',                 c.class,
    'type',                  c.type,
    'sub_type',              c.sub_type,
    'manufacturer',          c.manufacturer,
    'manufacturer_code',     c.manufacturer_code,
    'size',                  c.size,
    'grade',                 c.grade,
    'stats',                 c.stats,
    'source_id',             c.source_id,
    'source_slug',           c.source_slug,
    'uex_id',                c.uex_id,
    'uex_uuid',              c.uex_uuid,
    'uex_slug',              el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',        el.match_field,
    'uex_category_id',       c.uex_category_id,
    'uex_category_name',     c.uex_category_name,
    'uex_category_section',  c.uex_category_section,
    'sold_at',               COALESCE(sau.sold_at,        '[]'::jsonb),
    'sold_at_dp4k',          COALESCE(sadp.sold_at_dp4k,  '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(c.name, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.manufacturer, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.type, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.uex_category_name, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(c.uex_category_section, '')
  ),
  now(),
  (dhi.slug IS NOT NULL)
FROM datap4k_components_norm c
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id = c.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_uex sau           ON sau.comp_id  = c.id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_dp4k sadp         ON sadp.comp_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc  ON esc.entity_type = 'component' AND esc.datap4k_slug = c.slug
LEFT JOIN datap4k_hidden_items dhi ON dhi.slug = c.slug
WHERE dhi.slug IS NULL OR dhi.exclude_from_entity_display = false
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now(),
  hidden          = EXCLUDED.hidden
